name: Lokshen Kugel- (Noodle Pudding)
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat the eggs and sugar until fluffy.
2. Add the remaining ingredients, except the nuts.
3. Pour into a well-oiled 2-quart casserole dish or an 8-inch baking pan.
4. Sprinkle the nuts on top.
5. Bake in a 350-degree oven for 40 to 50 minutes, or until browned.
6. Serves 6
One Serving calories: 225
Carbohydrates: 33
Protein: 6
Fat: 8
Sodium: 27
Potassium: 215
Cholesterol: 88
Exchange Value: 1-1/2 Bread Exchanges + 1-1/2 Fruit Exchanges + 1 1/2 Fat Exchanges
